market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Tesla Q1 revenue rises, driven by EV sales and FSD subscriptions
articles.description: Sales rebounded a bit from the first quarter of 2025, as Tesla throws a ton of money at massive bets like robotics, AI, and its own chip fab.

articles.title: Elon Musk's Tesla reports unchanged bitcoin holdings, books $173 million digital asset loss
articles.description: The company's bitcoin stash remained at 11,509 BTC, worth about $880 million at bitcoin's current price of around $78,000.

articles.title: Banking group asks for more time to comment on US stablecoin bill
articles.description: The letter to four US government agencies said banks needed 60 more days for comment after OCC stablecoin rulemaking had been finalized.

articles.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin energizes 11,298 new ASICs
articles.description: American Bitcoin (ABTC) originally purchased the mining rigs in March, weeks after reporting a $59 million loss for Q4 2025.

articles.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
articles.description: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

articles.title: Apple fixes bug that cops used to extract deleted chat messages from iPhones
articles.description: The iPhone and iPad bug allowed law enforcement using forensic tools to read messages that had long been deleted by the Signal app.

articles.title: From the stage to the future: Where are Startup Battlefield’s alumni now?
articles.description: We wanted to show you what happens after the confetti falls. We checked in with some of our recent alumni, many of whom have sat down with us on Build Mode: The Founder Survival Guide, TechCrunch's podcast for founders at every stage.

articles.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
articles.description: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

articles.title: The question isn't whether privacy. It's what sort of privacy
articles.description: Blockchains are going private. The only question left is what kind of privacy the industry will build, argues Schiller.

articles.title: Thailand regulator mulls crypto futures expansion in licensing overhaul
articles.description: Thailand’s SEC is seeking feedback on rule changes that would let digital asset firms offer derivatives within existing entities, lowering barriers to market entry.

articles.title: Kraken calls for de minimus exemption on crypto taxes after 2025 reports
articles.description: The crypto exchange advocated for two key changes to US tax law affecting crypto users to “eliminate millions of unnecessary forms.”

articles.title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
articles.description: Google brings Gemini-powered "auto browse" capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.

articles.title: Pyth Network to determine outcomes in Kalshi’s commodities expansion
articles.description: The prediction platform will use Pyth’s pricing data to settle trades on its new commodities markets, as it expands into assets like oil, gold and crops.

articles.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
articles.description: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: It is geared for IT and technical users.

articles.title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
articles.description: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.

articles.title: Robinhood Venture Fund's $75M stake in OpenAI aims to enable retail investments
articles.description: The private equity investment will be used to give retail customers indirect price exposure to OpenAI through venture tokens.

articles.title: Banks seek to slow down implementation of crypto's GENIUS Act on stablecoin oversight
articles.description: U.S. banking groups argued that a number of federal agencies are moving quickly on stablecoin regulations, making it hard to understand how rules will interact.

articles.title: The Protocol: Kelp DAO exploited for $292 million
articles.description: Also: DPRK hacking crypto, Aave contagion and Coinbase on quantum computing.

articles.title: Ethereum risks 10% decline versus Bitcoin despite record ETH staking
articles.description: Ethereum’s record 32.33% staking ratio is shrinking liquid supply, reducing sell pressure and potentially supporting an ETH price recovery over time.

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: Protecting the people building DeFi infrastructure
articles.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Jennifer Rosenthal writes on the need to protect the people actually building DeFi infrastructure. Then, Alexis Sirkia comments on how Ethereum's L2 strategy is failing due to a fundamental design flaw.
